## Tags
date, month, year, event, sort, order, ascending, descending, increasing, decreasing, rising, falling

## Categories
time

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/calendar-arrow-down)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CalendarArrowDown;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CalendarArrowDown { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
